puzzle.title: The Earth's Embrace
puzzle.intro: In a time of great trials, a renowned individual was granted immense worldly abundance, a test of gratitude and humility. This figure's journey serves as a profound lesson on the fleeting nature of material possessions and the consequences of arrogance. Uncover the identity of this soul whose story is etched into the very ground beneath us.
clues: I lived among a people guided by a great messenger.
Allah bestowed upon me such vast riches that the very keys to my treasures were a heavy burden for many strong individuals.
My people, knowing my wealth, advised me to seek the abode of the Hereafter with what Allah had given me and not to forget my share of the world, and to do good as Allah had done good to me.
I arrogantly declared that my immense wealth was attained solely through my own knowledge and effort, denying any divine favor.
When asked to contribute or acknowledge Allah's bounty, I proudly refused, believing my possessions were exclusively mine.
As a result of my extreme arrogance and oppression, Allah commanded the earth to open and swallow me and my dwelling.

outcome.label: Outcome
options: Living a long life of piety

puzzle.arabic: فَخَسَفْنَا بِهِۦ وَبِدَارِهِ ٱلْأَرْضَ فَمَا كَانَ لَهُۥ مِن فِئَةٍۢ يَنصُرُونَهُۥ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَمَا كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُنتَصِرِينَ
puzzle.verse: And We caused the earth to swallow him and his home. And there was for him no company to aid him other than Allāh, nor was he of those who [could] defend themselves. (28:81)
